input_text:
Subject: Duplicate invoice charge

Hi support, I'm Ava Cole from account AC-100 on the Pro plan. Our April invoice was charged twice in the billing portal after I updated the card on file. Please refund the duplicate charge and confirm that auto-pay is still active.

actions_requested: Refund the duplicate April invoice charge
Confirm that auto-pay is still enabled
target.summary: Customer reports a duplicate invoice charge after updating billing details and wants a refund plus billing confirmation.

input_text: I am Ben Ortiz, admin for account BIZ-204. I was locked out of the account portal after the MFA reset yesterday and the backup codes are no longer accepted. We have a customer rollout in two hours, so please restore admin access and reset MFA enrollment as soon as possible.

target.summary: Business admin is locked out after an MFA reset and needs urgent account restoration before a rollout.

input_text: Hello team, Priya Shah from ENT-778 here. Since the iOS update this morning, the mobile app crashes every time our field reps open the offline sync screen. Can you investigate the crash logs and let us know whether there is an active incident? We can work around it for a few hours, but it blocks demos.

actions_requested: Confirm whether there is an active incident
target.summary: Enterprise customer reports an iOS crash on the offline sync screen and requests investigation plus incident confirmation.

input_text: We're evaluating your API for an upcoming integration. It would be helpful if webhook subscriptions could be filtered by environment and event type instead of receiving everything. No rush, I mainly want to know if that feature is on the roadmap.

actions_requested: Share whether webhook filtering is on the roadmap
target.summary: Prospective user requests filtered webhook subscriptions and asks whether the feature is planned.

input_text: Our Salesforce connector has started replaying failed sync jobs for about thirty minutes after we rotate OAuth credentials. I'm Marta Silva on account INT-442. Could you share the retry guidance or best practice for credential rotation? The integration eventually recovers, so this is not a sev-1.

actions_requested: Provide credential rotation guidance for the Salesforce connector
target.summary: Customer requests guidance for Salesforce connector retries after rotating OAuth credentials.

input_text: Quick question from Jordan Lee. I am on the free plan and using the web app trial workspace. Where can I download prior receipts without upgrading? If there is a help article, just point me to it. Thanks for the solid onboarding flow so far.

actions_requested: Share instructions for downloading prior receipts
target.summary: Free-plan user asks where to download prior receipts in the web app and would accept a help article.

input_text: We accidentally created a duplicate workspace during migration and now some usage credits are split across both environments. The second workspace only exists because of our import script. Please close the duplicate workspace and transfer any remaining credits if possible.

target.summary: User requests cleanup of a duplicate workspace created during migration and wants remaining credits moved.

input_text: This is Mei Tan from ENT-990. The tax exemption flag disappeared on our latest invoice, so the billing portal generated the wrong total. Please correct the invoice and send the updated PDF to finance before month-end close tomorrow.

actions_requested: Send an updated invoice PDF to finance
target.summary: Enterprise customer reports a missing tax exemption on an invoice and needs a corrected PDF before close.

input_text: Our API started returning intermittent 500 responses on the /v1/usage endpoint after today's deploy. I'm Noah Kim from account API-321 on the Business plan. Please investigate and share an ETA. We can retry some calls, but our usage dashboards are currently broken.

actions_requested: Share an ETA for a fix
target.summary: Business customer reports intermittent API failures on the usage endpoint and requests investigation plus ETA.

input_text: Hi there. We are comparing a few vendors and I can't tell whether your platform supports regional data residency in the starter tier or only on custom contracts. I do not have an account yet. A documentation link is enough if one exists.

actions_requested: Provide documentation about regional data residency availability
target.summary: Prospective customer asks whether regional data residency is available on starter plans and would accept documentation.
